title: counterflow dual-axis profile pair
why_selected: Useful reference for tightly stacked dual-axis profile comparisons where one paper figure carries both thermochemical trends and a shared stoichiometric marker.
borrow: the quiet two-panel rhythm for comparing two operating points
the visual separation between primary and secondary y-axis quantities
the restrained use of one vertical reference marker across both panels

the figure unless a dual-axis profile view is scientifically necessary
